# Data Integration

Manage OCI Data Integration resources from Kubernetes with a generatedruntime staging baseline.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `dataintegration` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-dataintegration-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-dataintegration:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-dataintegration-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
